body_text:
24:18 â May 3, 2024
Same Day CRA Bill Payment Reversal Requests
The Payment Solutions Manual was updated to reflect the changes made to same day CRA bill payment reversal requests.
Bill Payments Volume
Electronic Bill Payments System Part
Section 12.2, Electronic Bill Payment Reversal Requests
Updated this section to reflect that all corporate and personal CRA bill payment reversal requests are no longer accepted. Updated screenshots of the Bill Payment Reversal Request form were also added.
CRA Business Taxes Part
Section 8.1, Overview of Processing Business Tax Payments and Filings Electronically
Updated this section to add an important note regarding that all corporate and personal CRA bill payment reversal requests are no longer accepted. All previous references to reversing CRA business tax payments and making same day reversal requests has been removed.
Electronic Transactions Volume
PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct Part
Section 12.1, Overview of Business Taxes
We removed any references to reversals of CRA business tax payments.
